title: Xionian Revolution
description: W.I.P. mod about mechanical stuff and dimensions.
body:
# **Xionian Revolution** ### A mod by bastiouse. ![xionianrevolutionlogo](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1250905282989789286/1428577426694471700/image.png?ex=68f4fc28&is=68f3aaa8&hm=4a40df39ac393e61d1fb1fb080f7dad70444a6953e66e34999274ef7216fabc2&) Xionian Revolution is a mod that will add a new dimension to minecraft..
It had began development, but it would take a while to finish it.

The mod is going to add a new dimension where you fight waves and waves of mobs, adds new items, weapons, armor, and even boss fights!

![modstuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0e9a0599ebac9c7cf6edd118ee43ba1df223b63_0.webp)
The mod's focus is about adding and expanding the idea of futuristic alien technology, and having to fight the aliens to go back to the overworld.

**It will release soon!** **_WE HAVE A CURSEFORGE PAGE!_** [here](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xionian-revolution)
